title: Module Title
subtitle: One-line description of what the learner will understand

analogy.title: Analogy Title (familiar domain)
analogy.text: 3-4 sentence analogy from restaurants, airports, hospitals, offices, libraries, or construction. Map each concept to something tangible.

sections.title: Section Title
sections.body: HTML content. Use bold for key terms. Use italic for emphasis. Include at least one UCC domain example.

sections.title: Analogy Section Title
sections.body: Extended analogy text if the main analogy box isn't enough

sections.title: Code Example Title
sections.code:
# UCC domain code example
# Must be complete and runnable
def example():
    pass

sections.question: WHEN or WHY question (not WHAT recall). Include a scenario.
sections.explanation: Explanation that connects to module takeaway and UCC context

takeaway: EXACTLY one sentence. The single most important thing from this module.
labUnderstand: 2-3 sentence description of the Understand It lab.
labBuild: 2-3 sentence description of the Build It with AI lab.
